card_description: Richard M. Nixon is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Dick explores the "Rome Two" superimposition theory, identifying the Nixon administration as the return of the Roman Empire and the fall of Nixon as a true historical victory for Christ."
